nasb.text: Who drink wine from sacrificial bowls While they anoint themselves with the finest of oils, Yet they have not grieved over the ruin of Joseph.

esv.text: who drink wine in bowls and anoint themselves with the finest oils, but are not grieved over the ruin of Joseph!

cnv.text: 你們用大碗喝酒， 用最貴重的膏油抹身； 但你們並沒有為約瑟的敗落而痛心。

ccb.text: 你们以大碗狂饮， 用上等膏油抹身， 却漠不关心约瑟家的衰亡。
